title: Provide a repeatable intro video demo workflow
description: Ensure the render script can generate the intro MP4/JPG and the Gatsby homepage can preview it locally with a documented GATSBY_VIDEOS_BASE_URL example.
creator: unknown

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Render script and preview workflow are in place. Not executed locally because VIDEOML_CLI and BABULUS_BUNDLE are environment-specific; run node scripts/render-videos.js after setting them to validate output.
